# Backend Service: referral

This service owns referral campaign configuration, invite codes, invite events,
invite relations, reward audit rows, and referral-specific operator read models.

## Scope

- Keep growth/referral lifecycle state in `referral_*` tables.
- Keep billing subscription, wallet, bucket, and ledger facts in
  `src/api/flaskr/service/billing`.
- Keep auth route handlers thin; registration-time binding belongs in
  `service/referral/auth_hooks.py` and `service/referral/service.py`.

## Do

- Load campaign and reward behavior from `referral_campaigns` and
  `referral_campaign_reward_rules`.
- Preserve idempotency by business identifiers and invitee binding constraints.
- Hash client IP and user agent before persistence.
- Use billing helper APIs for plan rewards instead of writing billing artifacts
  directly from route handlers.

## Avoid

- Do not hardcode campaign-specific product code, cap count, copy keys, or route
  templates in post-auth logic.
- Do not store raw IP addresses or raw user agent values in referral event rows.
- Do not let anonymous invite APIs reveal inviter account details.

## Tests

- Add focused tests under `src/api/tests/service/referral/`.
- Run referral tests plus touched user/billing tests before shipping changes.
